scripts.dev: spacetime start & sleep 5 && spacetime publish --delete-data=on-conflict racetimetracker-dev -y && spacetime dev
scripts.generate: spacetime generate --lang typescript --out-dir client/src/module_bindings --module-path spacetimedb && spacetime generate --lang typescript --out-dir client2/src/module_bindings --module-path spacetimedb
scripts.reset: kill $(pgrep spacetime) 2>/dev/null || true; sleep 1; spacetime server clear -y; spacetime logout
scripts.deploy:preview: spacetime publish --env preview -y && npm run deploy:preview -w client
scripts.deploy:prod: spacetime publish --env prod -y && npm run deploy:prod -w client
scripts.remote-control: while true; do claude remote-control; sleep 5; done
